# BP-79 positive variant: renamed local cancellation function is passed away without local release
lang: go
file: BP-79-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: renamed-cancel
---
package sample

import "context"

func retainCancel(context.CancelFunc) {}

func Derive(parent context.Context) context.Context {
	ctx, stop := context.WithCancel(parent)
	retainCancel(stop)
	return ctx
}
